name: QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - Deprecated TLS Version in Use
notes: This rule triggers when QRadar Network Insights has detected a deprecated TLS session. According to NIST publication 800-52 and ACSC's advice on implementing TLS, TLS 1.0 and 1.1 are strongly discouraged.
conditions_text: when the flow matches Protocol Name is not N/A, Protocol Name is any of TLS, Protocol Version is not N/A, Protocol Version is any of [1.0 or 1.1]
TD_list: APPLY QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - Deprecated TLS Version in Use on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow matches Protocol Name is not N/A, Protocol Name is any of TLS, Protocol Version is not N/A, Protocol Version is any of [1.0 or 1.1]
RED_list: Event name: QNI : Access to Improperly Secured Service - Deprecated TLS Version in Use
Event description: Detects when a deprecated TLS session has been observed. It is recommended that clients avoid usage of TLS 1.0 and TLS 1.1 as they are insecure.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
